description: Valid values for properties with constrained value sets in the PanKgraph ADA Neo4j schema. Used during Cypher refinement to show exact valid values and reject hallucinated values.

name.description: Valid anatomical structure names. The graph stores ONLY the long UBERON/CL canonical labels. Short synonyms (e.g., 'Beta Cell', 'Alpha Cell') are NOT in anatomical_structure.name — they appear only on expression edges via the edge properties gene_detected_in.cell_type or gene_enriched_in.cell_type_label.
name.note: Case-sensitive, must match the long UBERON/CL form EXACTLY (e.g., 'type B pancreatic cell (beta cell)' NOT 'Beta Cell'). For 'Beta Cell' / 'Alpha Cell' style short labels, use the edge properties: gene_detected_in.cell_type or gene_enriched_in.cell_type_label.

category.note: Lowercase; choose one of the three.

source.description: Ontology source the structure was drawn from

name.note: MUST be lowercase. Do NOT use 'T1D', 'Type 1 Diabetes', or any other variant.

id.note: MONDO IDs use underscore (not colon) in this schema.

derived_diabetes_status.description: High-level diabetes status derived from donor metadata
derived_diabetes_status.note: Capitalized. Prefer this over diabetes_type for coarse filtering.

diabetes_type.note: Use 'Diabetes (Type I)' for T1D queries, 'Diabetes (Type II)' for T2D, 'Control Without Diabetes' for non-diabetic controls.

t1d_stage.description: T1D staging per the JDRF/Endocrine Society staging system
values: At-risk: single or transient autoantibody, normal glucose level
Stage 1: two or more autoantibodies, normal glucose metabolism level
Stage 2: two or more autoantibodies, dysglycemia (e.g., HbA1c >= 5.7%)
Stage 3: one or more autoantibodies and diagnostic hyperglycemia or T1D diagnosis
t1d_stage.note: Use CONTAINS 'Stage 3' style matches in Cypher since the strings are long.

Race.description: Donor race (note: property name is capitalized)
Race.note: Property NAME is 'Race' with a capital R.

hla_status.note: Use slash between alleles; 'X' denotes non-risk.

UpOrDownRegulation.description: Direction of differential expression in T1D vs ND
UpOrDownRegulation.note: Full strings — do NOT use 'up' or 'down'. Case-sensitive.

cell_type.description: Short cell-type label attached to expression edges (different from anatomical_structure.name long form)
cell_type.note: Short form (e.g., 'Beta' NOT 'Beta Cell' NOT 'type B pancreatic cell (beta cell)'). This is the property attached to the edge — the target anatomical_structure node still uses the long canonical name.

condition.description: Donor cohort the expression was computed on

expression_call.description: Expression call for the gene in the cell type
expression_call.note: Single value — presence of the edge implies expression was detected.

cell_type_label.description: Short cell-type label on marker-gene edges (note: no spaces in multi-word labels)
cell_type_label.note: WARNING: labels here have NO spaces (e.g., 'ActiveStellate', 'CyclingAlpha') while gene_detected_in.cell_type uses spaces ('Active Stellate', 'Cycling Alpha'). They are intentionally different.

condition.description: Condition the marker genes were derived from
condition.note: Marker genes were computed on non-diabetic donors only.

tissue_name.description: Tissue in which the QTL was fine-mapped

lead_status.description: Whether the variant is the lead of its GWAS signal

pathway_collection.description: Pathway collection the enriched gene belongs to
Pathway collection of the enriched pathway
